initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    ((MAX(results.position) - MIN(results.position)) * 100.0 / MAX(results.position)) AS percentage_faster
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2008 
  AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((MAX(results.position) - MIN(results.position)) * 100.0 / MIN(results.position)) AS percentage_faster
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2008 
  AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((last_driver.milliseconds - champion.milliseconds) * 100.0 / champion.milliseconds) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races
JOIN 
    results champion ON races.raceId = champion.raceId AND champion.position = 1
JOIN 
    results last_driver ON races.raceId = last_driver.raceId AND last_driver.position = (
        SELECT MAX(position) 
        FROM results r2 
        JOIN races r3 ON r2.raceId = r3.raceId 
        WHERE r3.year = 2008 AND r3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    )
WHERE 
    races.year = 2008 
    AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(
        ((MAX(results.position) - 1) * 100.0) / (MAX(results.position) - 1) AS INTEGER
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races
JOIN 
    results ON races.raceId = results.raceId
WHERE 
    races.year = 2008 
    AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((MAX(results.position) - MIN(results.position)) * 100.0 / MAX(results.position)) AS percentage_faster
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2008 
  AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    ((MAX(results.position) - MIN(results.position)) * 100.0 / MAX(results.position)) AS percentage_faster
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2008 
  AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    ((CAST((SELECT MAX(r2.position) 
            FROM results r2 
            JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId 
            WHERE ra2.year = 2008 AND ra2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix') - 
           (SELECT MIN(r1.position) 
            FROM results r1 
            JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId 
            WHERE ra1.year = 2008 AND ra1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AS REAL) * 100.0) / 
     (SELECT MAX(r3.position) 
      FROM results r3 
      JOIN races ra3 ON r3.raceId = ra3.raceId 
      WHERE ra3.year = 2008 AND ra3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix')) AS percentage_faster;

SELECT 
    ((last_driver.position - first_driver.position) * 100.0 / last_driver.position) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    (SELECT position FROM results 
     JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
     WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
     ORDER BY position ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_driver,
    (SELECT position FROM results 
     JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
     WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
     ORDER BY position DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_driver

SELECT 
    ((last_place.milliseconds - first_place.milliseconds) * 100.0 / first_place.milliseconds) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races r
JOIN 
    results first_place ON r.raceId = first_place.raceId AND first_place.position = 1
JOIN 
    results last_place ON r.raceId = last_place.raceId 
WHERE 
    r.year = 2008 
    AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    AND last_place.position = (
        SELECT MAX(position) 
        FROM results res 
        JOIN races r2 ON res.raceId = r2.raceId 
        WHERE r2.year = 2008 AND r2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    );
